creator: yuripv@yuripv.net
text:
Created attachment 196141
cleanup bectl.8

Clean up some markup issues in bectl.8:

- consistently use .Brq ({}) around alternative options
- consistently use .Cm for subcommands (https://mandoc.bsd.lv/mdoc/style/commands.html)
- do NOT use .Ao/.Ac around .Ar (updated mdoc.7 coming with new mandoc release explicitly tells NOT to do that, if it's being ugly is not enough)
